What We Do

More Than a Cart Dealer.

We take ordinary carts and turn them into something you are proud to own—from clean daily drivers to complete custom transformations.

01

Custom Builds

Seats, wheels, lighting, rear seats, audio and complete styling packages.

02

Lithium Upgrades

03

Ready-to-Ride Carts

Selected carts inspected, upgraded and prepared for their next owner.

04

Pickup & Delivery

Convenient local transport for purchases, upgrades and completed builds.

How It Works

From Idea to Finished Cart.

A straightforward process built around your style, your needs and your budget.

1

Choose Your Cart

Start with your cart, one from our inventory, or let us help source the right platform.

2

Customize It

Select seating, wheels, lighting, lithium power, street-use equipment and finishing details.

3

We Build It

We bring the design together with careful installation, clean workmanship and attention to detail.

4

Enjoy Your Legacy

Pick it up or arrange local delivery, then enjoy a cart built specifically for you.

Family Owned & Operated

Built by Family. Driven by Quality.

Legacy Cart Co. started as a father-and-sons project and grew into a family business built on craftsmanship, honest service and pride in every detail. Dan, Colin “Big Dog” and Colson “Little Dude” treat every cart like it is being built for their own family.

Dan leads the builds with Colin “Big Dog” and Colson “Little Dude” never far from the action. Every cart is treated like it is being built for our own family.
